articles.title: Oil Prices Go Down as US and Iran Might Talk Peace
articles.summary: Oil prices went down a little on Tuesday because people hope the US and Iran will have new peace talks. This hope makes people less worried about problems with oil supplies. On Monday, oil prices went up after the US blocked Iran's ports when talks failed. But then, President Trump said Iran called to make a deal. A news report said Iran offered to stop some nuclear work for five years, but the US wanted 20 years. Experts think this could mean less fighting and lower oil prices. However, oil is still more expensive than before the war started in February. The International Energy Agency says April might be worse because no new oil is being loaded.

articles.title: British Bands Win Big at Rock & Roll Hall of Fame
articles.summary: This year, a record number of British music groups are being honored by the Rock & Roll Hall of Fame. Six out of eight new members are from Britain, including popular bands like Oasis, Iron Maiden, and Sade. Other bands like Joy Division and New Order, which are connected, are also included. This breaks the old record from 2019 when five British acts were inducted. To join, bands must have released music at least 25 years ago. Liam Gallagher from Oasis first said he didn't care about the award but later joked and thanked fans on social media. The announcement was made on a TV show called American Idol, which was a funny choice because some bands like Joy Division are known for sad music. This event shows how British music has made a big impact in America over the years.

articles.title: Morrisons Supermarket Changes Jobs
articles.summary: Morrisons, a big supermarket in the UK, is planning to cut about 200 jobs at its head office in Bradford. This means some people might lose their jobs as part of a change to how the company works. Morrisons is using more technology like AI to do some tasks automatically, which is why they need fewer workers in the office. The company has about 96,000 employees in total, and these cuts affect less than one-tenth of the head office staff. Morrisons is talking to the workers to help them find other jobs in the company if possible. They say this is a tough decision but necessary to make the business better. The company is also trying to keep prices low for customers during hard times.

articles.title: Actor Gets Special Award from University
articles.summary: A famous actor named Ncuti Gatwa, who stars in the TV show Doctor Who, will get a special award called an honorary doctorate from the University of Glasgow. This award is given to people who do great things in their jobs and help society. The ceremony will happen in June, which is a special time because the university is celebrating its 575th birthday. Other people getting this award include a singer named Stuart Murdoch from a band called Belle and Sebastian, a BBC journalist named Sarah Smith, and her sister Baroness Catherine Smith. They will all be called 'Doctor' as a title to honor their work. The university leader says this award lets them recognize people who inspire others with their achievements. It's a happy event where they celebrate these special guests along with students who are graduating.

articles.title: Moya Brennan: A Famous Irish Singer
articles.summary: Moya Brennan was a famous Irish singer who passed away at age 73. She was best known as the lead singer of the group Clannad, which won awards like Grammys and Baftas. Moya came from a family in Donegal, Ireland, and started singing with her family in their pub. Clannad became popular worldwide, especially with songs for TV shows like Harry's Game and Robin of Sherwood. They were the first band to sing in Irish on a big TV music show. Moya also had a solo career and worked with other famous musicians. People loved her voice, and she was remembered as a kind person who loved her home in Donegal.

articles.title: Evergrande Founder Says Sorry for Money Problems
articles.summary: Hui Ka Yan, who started the big Chinese company Evergrande, said he was guilty in court. He did wrong things like taking money that was meant for building houses and using it for other projects. This happened in Shenzhen, China. Evergrande was once a huge real estate company worth over $50 billion, but it got into big trouble in 2021 because it owed too much money. The company had many projects across China that were not finished. Hui used to be very rich, but now he is in trouble. The court will decide his punishment later. This case is important because Evergrande's collapse hurt China's property market and made investors and banks lose money.
